description: Preguntas de prueba para el sistema Metamatemático, una por área y algunas generales. Cubren las 14 categorías del NLE v7.0 más preguntas de lenguaje natural mixtas.

algebra: Prove that the set of invertible elements of a ring forms a group under multiplication.
Show that every finite integral domain is a field.
Prove that if G is a group of order p^2 where p is prime, then G is abelian.
Demonstrate that the polynomial x^4 + 1 is irreducible over Q.
Prove that every subgroup of a cyclic group is cyclic.
Show that Z[sqrt(-5)] is not a unique factorization domain.
Prueba que todo grupo de orden primo es cíclico.
¿Es el anillo Z/6Z un dominio integral? Justifica.
number-theory: Show that there are infinitely many prime numbers.
Prove that for all n in N, n^2 + n is divisible by 2.
Demonstrate that gcd(a, b) * lcm(a, b) = a * b for positive integers a, b.
Prove Fermat's little theorem: if p is prime and gcd(a, p) = 1, then a^(p-1) ≡ 1 (mod p).
Show that every prime p > 2 is of the form 4k+1 or 4k+3.
Prueba que no existe un entero cuyo cuadrado sea congruente a 2 módulo 4.
¿Cuántos primos menores de 50 existen? Lista todos.
analysis: Prove that every Cauchy sequence of real numbers converges.
Show that the function f(x) = x^2 is uniformly continuous on [0, 1] but not on R.
Prove that if a function is differentiable at a point, it is continuous there.
Demonstrate that the series sum 1/n^2 converges.
Prueba que la suma de una serie absolutamente convergente no depende del orden de sus términos.
Demuestra que toda función continua en un compacto alcanza su máximo.
topology: Prove that a continuous image of a compact space is compact.
Show that [0,1] is not homeomorphic to (0,1).
Prove that every metric space is Hausdorff.
Demonstrate that the product of two connected spaces is connected.
Show that a subset of R^n is compact if and only if it is closed and bounded.
Prueba que toda función continua de un espacio compacto en R es uniformemente continua.
¿Es el círculo S^1 homeomorfo al intervalo [0,1]? Justifica.
logic: Prove that (P → Q) is logically equivalent to (¬P ∨ Q).
Show that the formula (P ∧ ¬P) is a contradiction.
Demonstrate that ¬∀x P(x) is equivalent to ∃x ¬P(x).
Prove that modus ponens is a sound inference rule.
Show that propositional logic is decidable.
Is the formula (P → (Q → P)) a tautology? Prove it.
Prueba que si Γ ⊨ φ y Γ ⊆ Δ, entonces Δ ⊨ φ.
¿Puede una fórmula ser verdadera en todos los modelos finitos pero falsa en uno infinito?
set-theory: Prove that the power set of a set A has strictly greater cardinality than A (Cantor's theorem).
Show that the union of countably many countable sets is countable.
Prove that R is uncountable (Cantor's diagonal argument).
Show that the Cartesian product N × N is countable.
Prove that for any sets A, B, C: A ∩ (B ∪ C) = (A ∩ B) ∪ (A ∩ C).
Prueba que no existe el conjunto de todos los conjuntos.
¿Cuál es la cardinalidad del conjunto de todas las funciones de N en {0,1}?
combinatorics: Prove the binomial theorem: (x+y)^n = sum_{k=0}^{n} C(n,k) x^k y^(n-k).
Show that C(n, k) = C(n, n-k) for all valid n, k.
Prove that the number of surjective functions from {1,...,n} to {1,...,k} is k! * S(n,k) where S(n,k) is the Stirling number.
Demonstrate that in any group of 13 people, at least 2 share a birth month.
How many ways can 8 rooks be placed on a chessboard with no two attacking each other?
Prove that the number of partitions of n into odd parts equals the number of partitions of n into distinct parts.
¿De cuántas formas se pueden ordenar las letras de la palabra MATEMATICA?
Prueba la identidad de Vandermonde: C(m+n, r) = sum_{k=0}^{r} C(m,k)*C(n,r-k).
probability: Show that P(A ∪ B) = P(A) + P(B) - P(A ∩ B).
Prove Bayes' theorem: P(A|B) = P(B|A)P(A) / P(B).
Demonstrate that the expected value of a sum of random variables equals the sum of their expected values.
What is the probability that in a group of 23 people, at least two share a birthday?
Prove that the variance of a sum of independent random variables equals the sum of their variances.
Show that Markov's inequality holds: P(X ≥ a) ≤ E[X]/a for X ≥ 0, a > 0.
Si lanzamos un dado justo 3 veces, ¿cuál es la probabilidad de obtener exactamente dos seises?
¿Cuál es la distribución de la suma de dos variables aleatorias uniformes independientes en [0,1]?
geometry: Show that the sum of interior angles of any triangle is 180 degrees.
Prove that the three medians of a triangle are concurrent (centroid).
Demonstrate that a circle is determined by any three non-collinear points.
Show that opposite angles in a cyclic quadrilateral sum to 180 degrees.
Prove that the area of a circle of radius r is π r^2.
Prueba que todo triángulo inscrito en una semicircunferencia es rectángulo.
¿Cuál es el volumen de un tetraedro regular de arista a?
category-theory: Prove that the composition of two functors is a functor.
Show that every adjunction gives rise to a monad.
Demonstrate that the Yoneda lemma holds: Nat(Hom(A,-), F) ≅ F(A).
Prove that left adjoints preserve colimits.
Show that the forgetful functor from Grp to Set has a left adjoint (the free group functor).
What is the colimit of the diagram N → N → N → ... where each arrow is the successor function?
Prueba que los isomorfismos en una categoría son exactamente los morfismos con inverso a ambos lados.
¿Qué es un topos elemental y en qué se diferencia de Set?
computation: Prove that the halting problem is undecidable.
Demonstrate that the class P is closed under complement.
Prove that if a language L is decidable, then its complement is also decidable.
Show that every regular language can be recognized by a finite automaton.
What is the time complexity of the naive matrix multiplication algorithm? Can we do better?
Prueba que 3-SAT se reduce polinomialmente a CLIQUE.
¿Cuál es la diferencia entre P y NP? ¿Por qué es difícil probar que P ≠ NP?
optimization: Prove that a local minimum of a convex function is a global minimum.
State and prove the KKT conditions for constrained optimization.
Show that the simplex method terminates in finite steps (assuming non-degeneracy).
Prove the strong duality theorem for linear programming.
Demonstrate that gradient descent converges for L-smooth convex functions with step size 1/L.
What is the optimal solution to: minimize x^2 + y^2 subject to x + y = 1?
Prueba que el problema del viajante (TSP) es NP-difícil.
¿Qué condiciones garantizan que un problema de optimización tiene solución única?
lean-tactics: Write a Lean 4 proof that 2 + 2 = 4 using norm_num.
Prove in Lean 4 that for all n : Nat, n + 0 = n.
Write a Lean 4 proof that the composition of injective functions is injective.
Demonstrate the use of the `ring` tactic to prove (a + b)^2 = a^2 + 2*a*b + b^2.
Write a Lean 4 proof by induction that sum_{i=0}^{n} i = n*(n+1)/2.
Show how to use `simp` with custom lemmas in Lean 4.
Escribe en Lean 4 la prueba de que todo número par al cuadrado es divisible por 4.
proof-strategies: Give an example of a proof by contradiction and explain why contradiction is necessary.
Explain when to use strong induction vs simple induction, with an example of each.
Show a proof by contrapositive: if n^2 is even, then n is even.
Give an example of a constructive proof vs a non-constructive existence proof.
Demonstrate the technique of proof by cases for: |a + b| ≤ |a| + |b|.
Explain the diagonal argument as a proof strategy and give two different applications.
¿Cuándo es útil la técnica de demostración por el principio del buen orden?
Demuestra por inducción fuerte que todo entero mayor que 1 tiene un factor primo.

mixed_natural_language: Is 1 a prime number? Why or why not?
What is the difference between a theorem and a lemma?
Can a set be an element of itself? What does ZFC say about this?
Why is division by zero undefined?
What is the difference between countable and uncountable infinity?
¿Por qué el número de Euler e es irracional?
¿Cuál es la diferencia entre una demostración constructiva y una no constructiva?
¿Existe un número primo entre n y 2n para todo n ≥ 1? (Postulado de Bertrand)
¿Por qué π es irracional y qué significa eso para la geometría?

cross_category.query: Prove that every vector space has a basis (using Zorn's lemma).
cross_category.note: Requiere AC/Zorn de ZFC + estructura algebraica

cross_category.query: Show that the fundamental group of the circle S^1 is isomorphic to Z.
Prove that the category of sets and functions has all small limits and colimits.
cross_category.note: MES: exactamente el tipo de colímite que construye el sistema

cross_category.query: Demonstrate that the Curry-Howard correspondence maps proofs to programs.
Prove that the chromatic polynomial of a graph satisfies a deletion-contraction recurrence.
Show that the central limit theorem holds for iid random variables with finite variance.
